creator: hiro@physics.s.chiba-u.ac.jp
text:
While booting FreeBSD as a guest OS on VMware2.03 for Windows 2000 
with 2 or 3 virtual ethernet adapter devices,
VMware panics after probing for 1st ethernet adapter device(lnc0).

Fix: please apply this patch to $FreeBSD: /c/ncvs/src/sys/pci/if_pcn.c,v 1.20 2001/02/26 22:23:55 wpaul Exp $.
How-To-Repeat: Booting GENERIC kernel on VMware2 with 2 or 3 ethernet adpaters.
